PoC-Unauthenticated-RCE-in-WatchGuard-Fireware-12.7-Build-640389-CVE-2025-9242: Version-pinned archival PoC for CVE-2025-9242 on WatchGuard Fireware 12.7 build 640389. Includes safe detection, offline payload analysis, and an explicitly gated reverse-shell exploit using a caller-supplied IPv4 callback endpoint.
